name: TerraSky Co.,Ltd.
summary: TerraSky Co.,Ltd. provides cloud products and solutions in Japan and internationally. It offers cloud integration services comprising Salesforce, Amazon Web services, Heroku, contact center solutions, SAP migration, and RPA Total Solutions; cloud consulting services, such as cloud ERP concierge, system planning, AppExchange consulting, IoT consulting, marketing automation operation support, and BI tool introduction support services; and development support tools, such as DataSpider cloud, SkyOnDemand, DCSpider, SkyVisualEditor, SuPICE, and Flosum. The company was formerly known as Head Solutions Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Terasakai Co.,Ltd. in February 2007. TerraSky Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
